text:
Created attachment 151429
arp-scan 1.9

Hi

As slight *bump* attempt I've attached a now-cleaned up version of my previous patch. I've now spotted the download URL of the release tarball of arp-scan, this seems easier to me than having to use download on Github.

'portlint -AC' and poudriere testport seem to be both happy.

Regards,
Mathieu
